results.query: migrate all vllm instances to a new GPU server

arguments.reason: This is a multi-step infrastructure migration involving moving all vllm instances (vllm-35b, vllm-8b, vllm-4b, vllm-vlm) to a new GPU server. This requires human oversight for: provisioning or configuring the new GPU server, coordinating service migration with minimal downtime, updating port allocations and networking, verifying service health post-migration, and having a rollback plan if issues arise. The blast radius is large if something goes wrong.

results.query: set up a new OpenClaw instance for a third user

arguments.reason: Setting up a new OpenClaw instance involves provisioning a new service, determining port allocation, and configuration changes that affect the infrastructure. This requires human judgment to decide on the appropriate setup (which node, port, authentication, etc.) and coordination to ensure it integrates properly with the existing setup.
